riskRows.detail: Replay into main will produce new commit SHAs and must carry explicit mapping and audit in later contours.
C02 must keep replay scope bound to the included set only and must not widen to carryforward history by default.
Any attempt to treat root as formal truth before main promotion would recreate split-brain.

rollbackRows.action: Stop and preserve this contour as selection-only with no new execution authority.
rollbackRows.trigger: Any later contour attempts replay execution without the approved C02 replay plan packet.

rollbackRows.action: Reject the contour and keep main as the sole formal truth surface.
rollbackRows.trigger: Any later contour implies default branch switch or root truth promotion.
